title: PostgreSQL permission denied for database on n8n startup
symptom: n8n fails to initialize with 'permission denied for database VN8N' despite successful manual connection using the 'mgr' user.
root_cause: The 'mgr' user lacks sufficient privileges on the 'VN8N' database. While it can create tables, it does not have the necessary permissions to perform all operations required by n8n during initialization.
fix_steps: Connect to the PostgreSQL database as a superuser
Run the command: GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE 'VN8N' TO mgr;
agent_instruction: Grant all privileges on the VN8N database to the mgr user and restart n8n.
